reference: Hi, I am three days late on my period, and I had sexual intercourse three weeks ago, and it was unprotected. I am also on birth control, but I have irregular periods. I started spotting two days after for about one and a half days. I have been throwing up, and I feel exhausted every day with no energy. I also have really bad heartburn and acid reflux. Could I be pregnant?
text: Hi, I am three days late on my period and I had sexual intercourse three weeks ago and it was unprotected. I am also on birth control, but I have a regular periods. I started spotting after for about one and a half days. I have been throwing up and I feel exhausted every day with no energy. I also have really bad heartburn and acid reflux. Can I be pregnant?
